prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia tests an image frame inside a blog article. She adjusts a small zoom slider and checks that the image fits without breaking layout.

Core meaning: testing image insertion and zoom display in a post.

Style: clean blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, small blue layout guides. Minimal labels: "图片", "zoom", "布局正常".

Avoid using the original course image, avoid clutter.
